fault_hypothesis: The clamping logic is incorrectly inverted. It is executed when `clamp` is False instead of when it is True, due to a negated condition on line 66.

constraints.intent: The interpolated value is only within the supply range for passing tests, not for failing extrapolation tests.
When clamping is disabled (the 'then' branch of the buggy 'if'), the interpolated value should be returned unmodified.
When clamping is enabled (the 'else' branch of the buggy 'if'), the final value must be within the supply range.
